zh.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Cransley是Hugh De Cransley和Agnes的女兒，於1295年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾。她於1314年與John de Heigham在英國素福爾可結婚。她去世於1340年在她的家鄉享年45歲。

nameMeanings.name: Cransley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Cranleigh in Surrey or either of the places called Cranley, in Suffolk and Lincolnshire.
Irish: from Ó Crónghaile ‘descendant of Crónghal’, a personal name composed of crón ‘brown’ and gal ‘valor’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Cransley was born in 1295, in Northamptonshire, England as the daughter of Hugh De Cransley and Agnes. She married John de Heigham in 1314, in Suffolk, England. She died in 1340, in her hometown, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Cransley est née en 1295, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, fille de Hugh De Cransley et Agnes. Elle a épousé John de Heigham en 1314, à Suffolk, Angleterre. Elle est décédée en 1340, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Cransley wurde 1295 in Northamptonshire, England, als Tochter von Hugh De Cransley und Agnes geboren. Sie hat 1314 in Suffolk, England John de Heigham geheiratet. Sie starb 1340 im Alter von 45 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Cransley è nata il nel 1295 nel Northamptonshire, England come figlia di Hugh De Cransley e Agnes. Lei sposato John de Heigham nel 1314, nel Suffolk, England. Morì nel 1340, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Cransleyは1295年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアでHugh De CransleyとAgnesの娘として生まれた。1314年にイギリススフォルクでJohn de Heighamと結婚した。彼女は1340年に故郷で45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Cransley(은)는 1295년 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 Hugh De Cransley(와)과 Agnes의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1314년 영국 수폴크에서 John de Heigham(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1340년 그녀의 고향에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Cransley nasceu em 1295, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra filha de Hugh De Cransley e Agnes. Ela casou-se com John de Heigham em 1314, em Suffolk, Inglaterra. Ela faleceu em 1340, em sua cidade natal, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Cransley родилась в 1295 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия. Её родителей звали Hugh De Cransley и Agnes. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Heigham в 1314 г. в местности суффолк, Англия. Она умерла в 1340 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Cransley nació en 1295, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra como hija de Hugh De Cransley y Agnes. Se casó con John de Heigham en 1314, en Suffolk, Inglaterra. Murió en 1340, en su pueblo, a la edad de 45 años.
